warnings: The handler plan says 'Extract userID from c.Get(middleware.ContextKeyUserID) → assert as uint64' without specifying an ok-check. The handler test case 'missing userID in context (401)' explicitly requires this path to return 401, but a direct type assertion (c.Get(...).(uint64)) will panic rather than return 401 when the value is absent or wrong type — the plan should specify using the two-value assertion form (val, ok := c.Get(...); if !ok ...) to return 401 gracefully.
